overall.description: A static cinematic shot of an empty Gothic great hall with wooden benches, ornate chandeliers, and a large clock at the far end. The scene appears to be from a fantasy video game, with warm artificial lighting illuminating the dark wood paneling and stone floors throughout the duration.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic great hall with long dining benches and chandeliers

agents.ego_description: stationary elevated view overlooking the empty hall

entered.detail: Large circular clock with roman numerals mounted above the far doorway
Elaborate iron chandelier with multiple candle-style lights hanging from the ceiling
Matching iron chandelier on the left side of the hall
Matching iron chandelier on the right side of the hall
Long wooden benches and tables arranged in rows facing the center aisle
Tall arched Gothic windows with dark blue night sky visible through them
Wall-mounted lantern-style lights between the windows
Wooden balcony railings on the upper level overlooking the hall

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a static elevated view of a grand Gothic hall illuminated by warm chandelier light. The space features long wooden benches arranged in rows, ornate iron chandeliers, and a large clock above the far doorway. Tall arched windows line the walls showing the night sky outside, while the hall remains completely empty and silent throughout the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, elevated perspective of a grand Gothic hall, preserving a mood of silent, timeless emptiness. It begins with a wide view of the space, where warm light from ornate iron chandeliers casts a golden glow over rows of long wooden benches. As the eye travels across the dark wood paneling and stone floors, the scene emphasizes the stillness of the vacant interior. The view then extends toward the far end of the hall, centering on a large clock positioned above the distant doorway. Finally, the composition frames the tall arched windows lining the walls, contrasting the warm artificial light inside with the deep darkness of the night sky outside.
